expectations.text: Lists at least 5 distinct checklist-related endpoint paths
expectations.evidence: Lists 17 endpoints across 6 groups covering standalone CRUD, check-items, relationships, field-level, board-level, and card-level

expectations.text: Shows HTTP methods (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE) for the endpoints
expectations.evidence: Each endpoint header shows the HTTP method (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE)

expectations.text: Lists query or path parameters for at least one endpoint
expectations.evidence: Detailed parameter tables for each endpoint with In, Required, Type, and Description columns
Section 2 dedicated to Check-Item Endpoints with GET, POST, GET, DELETE operations

expectations.text: Output is organized in a structured, easy-to-scan format
expectations.evidence: Well-organized with 6 numbered sections, markdown tables per endpoint. Not raw JSON.
